top_signals.title: US, Congo Ebola Travel Restrictions May Hamper Humanitarian Aid Response
top_signals.summary: New US and Congolese travel restrictions aimed at keeping Ebola from spreading across borders are drawing warnings from aid organizations and medical experts who say the measures could undermine efforts to control the world’s fastest-growing outbreak of the virus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Craftsman strives to hand down traditional kokeshi making skills
top_signals.summary: Toshio Takada quit his job and began training to eventually become an award-winning craftsman.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: INR/USD: HSBC Offers Indian Diaspora 19x Leverage on FCNR(B) Deposits
top_signals.summary: When Moumita Shome landed in Dubai from Australia last month, the calls from bankers started almost immediately.
